notes: Swedish Hardox 450 structural/abrasion-resistant steel by SSAB. 450 HBW hardness. Not certified armor plate — per Acar et al. 2024 published ballistic tests: ~0.70-0.85x RHAe. Reduced from 0.95 to 0.80 per IRL data. Primarily used in vehicle hulls where some ballistic protection is beneficial but not primary.
